EXW.title: View documents you will receive with your order

sheetOptions.title: Order documents
sheetOptions.description: These are the documents you will receive with your order
items: Evidence of payment of: export duty, taxes and customs clearance.
Evidence of payment of origin terminal charges

sheetOptions.title: Supporting photos
sheetOptions.description: Here are some photos available for your order. Please choose the ones you'd like us to provide.

sheetOptions.title: Supporting documents
sheetOptions.description: Here are some other documents available for your order. Please choose the ones you'd like us to provide.
items: Quality, Weight & Packing Certificate by Quality Assurance
Certificate of Analysis by SGS (or equivalent)

FAS.title: View documents you will receive with your order

sheetOptions.title: Order documents
sheetOptions.description: These are the documents you will receive with your order
items: Evidence of payment of: export duty, taxes and customs clearance.
Evidence of payment of origin terminal charges

sheetOptions.title: Supporting photos
sheetOptions.description: Here are some photos available for your order. Please choose the ones you'd like us to provide.
items: Photo of container with one door open (Cargo and Container No. should be visible)
Photo of closed container including seal (Seal No. Should be visible)

sheetOptions.title: Supporting documents
sheetOptions.description: Here are some other documents available for your order. Please choose the ones you'd like us to provide.
items: Master Bill of Lading / Air waybill
Quality, Weight & Packing Certificate by Quality Assurance
Fumigation Certificate stating method and material used
Certificate of Analysis by SGS (or equivalent)
Importer Security Filing (ISF) (for US export only)
